category_sources: source_facts.description says it lists assets from multiple cloud providers; ProjectDiscovery official docs describe cloudlist usage for cloud assets.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cloudlist; official ProjectDiscovery documentation and repository use cloudlist.
docs_sources: Official ProjectDiscovery documentation has a dedicated cloudlist usage page; official GitHub README is repository documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description supports cloud asset listing and multi-cloud tags; source_facts.executables identifies a CLI tool.
